description: The ``TimeSpan Total Seconds`` node takes in a TimeSpan and returns with the amount of seconds in that TimeSpan, including the fractional portion of a second, as well as anything longer than a second will be added into the total.

fields.TimeSpan: The TimeSpan we are getting info from.
fields.* ([[Type:double|double]]): Returns the amount of seconds in this TimeSpan as an double.
